title: Errata
abstract: In John Hagan and Holly Foster's article, “S/He's a Rebel: Toward a Sequential Stress Theory of Delinquency and Gendered Pathways to Disadvantage in Emerging Adulthood,” published in Social Forces 72(1), pp. 53–86, a few errors appeared in the first few lines of Tables 3B, 4A, and 4B. The correct versions of the tables are printed here.
